texto: I actually wanted to be a police officer like my dad for the longest time, up until my sophomore year in high school when I started doing plays. I did plays when I was little, but in high school, I started getting into acting.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Chad Lindberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I actually wanted to be a police officer like my dad for the longest time, up until my sophomore …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, time, school pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e school.
